---
title: 'Start Here | A Journey'
date: '2016-06-05T23:42:00.0030000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_type: 'PAGE'
blogger_blog: 'Destination Coeur d''Alene, Idaho'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_page_id: '345280568267182010'
blogger_filename: '/p/start-here-journey.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Destination Coeur d_Alene, Idaho/feed.atom'
---

<h3>
Destination Coeur dâ€˜Alene, ID</h3>
<h4>
This is our journey to a new land up northâ€¦<span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;"> </span>Come along for the ride.</h4>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/destination-coeur-dalene-9894c8fb908a.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="190" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/destination-coeur-dalene-77cabcde1319.jpg" width="400" /></a></div>
<br />
<br />
My name is Darrell Wolfe, and I'm a Multipotentilite (<a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/start-here-about.html" target="_blank">here</a>).<br />
<br />
<h4>
The Back Story</h4>
<div>
I grew up in the Palm Springs area of Southern California (Indio, CA). After my wife and I married, we relocated to Orange County (Santa Ana, CA) for a few years.</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
In 2009, we threw away, gave away, or sold almost everything we had. We packed 15 duffle bags, three bicycle boxes, and four small boxes; hopped on the Amtrack Texas Eagle... and three days later we were living in Fort Worth, Texas (DFW Metroplex, Roanoke, TX).<br />
<br />
We came for a season, and God prospered us here. We now know that season is coming to an end.</div>
<div>
<br />
<h4>
New Season</h4>
</div>
<div>
As I write this (June 2016) we are feeling the still small voice, and we are starting plans to move to North Idaho (Coeur d'Alene, ID here we come) in the next year or so.<br />
<br />
We have set a goal of May 2017, but are keeping fluid in our planning. We'll go when the Holy Spirit says "GO!".<br />
<br />
<h4>
The Goal</h4>
<br />
We'd like to move with our stuff this time... so we're planning the move. This site is to help us do just that. I've set a goal of $10,000; but, we'll let God be the final voice how much we need (or don't) when the time comes.<br />
<br />
We have no idea what adventures await us there. We know her mom and step-father live there, and we know there are forests and lakes. We know that God is calling us to go... so we'll go.<br />
<div>
<br /></div>
I hope you come with us on this journey, and see Coeur d'Alene through our eyes. Maybe you are thinking of going/coming too... I hope this helps you on your journey.<br />
<br /></div>
<h4>
Contribute: Here are a few ways you can help this move be a success:</h4>
<br />
<ul style="background-color: white; margin: 0.5em 0px; padding: 0px 2.5em;">
<li style="margin: 0px 0px 0.25em; padding: 0px;"><b>Pray for us.&nbsp;</b></li>
<ul>
<li style="margin: 0px 0px 0.25em; padding: 0px;">Specifically for guidance, wisdom, and favor.</li>
</ul>
</ul>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br />
<div style="-webkit-text-stroke-width: 0px; color: black; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: medium; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-weight: normal; letter-spacing: normal; line-height: normal; orphans: auto; text-align: start; text-indent: 0px; text-transform: none; white-space: normal; widows: 1; word-spacing: 0px;">
</div>
<br />
<ul style="-webkit-text-stroke-width: 0px; background-color: white; color: black; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: medium; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-weight: normal; letter-spacing: normal; line-height: normal; margin: 0.5em 0px; orphans: auto; padding: 0px 2.5em; text-align: start; text-indent: 0px; text-transform: none; white-space: normal; widows: 1; word-spacing: 0px;">
<li><b>Insights and Ideas!</b></li>
<ul><ul>
<li style="margin: 0px 0px 0.25em; padding: 0px;">Comment on any page/post, or email Me@DarrellWolfe.com if you have ideas or insights into Coeur d'Alene that you think we ought to know.</li>
</ul>
</ul>
</ul>
<div>
<br /></div>
</div>
<ul style="background-color: white; margin: 0.5em 0px; padding: 0px 2.5em;">
<li style="margin: 0px 0px 0.25em; padding: 0px;"><b>Follow Us via Email.&nbsp;</b></li>
<ul>
<li style="margin: 0px 0px 0.25em; padding: 0px;">On the right panel of this blog (or see below) to sign up to follow by email.</li>
</ul>
</ul>
<div>
<br />
<form action="https://feedburner.google.com/fb/a/mailverify" method="post" onsubmit="window.open('https://feedburner.google.com/fb/a/mailverify?uri=DestinationCoeurDaleneIdaho', 'popupwindow', 'scrollbars=yes,width=550,height=520');return true" style="border: 1px solid rgb(204, 204, 204); padding: 3px; text-align: center;" target="popupwindow">
Enter your email address:<br />
<input name="email" style="width: 140px;" type="text" /><br />
<input type="submit" value="Subscribe" /><br />
Delivered by&nbsp;<a href="https://feedburner.google.com/" target="_blank">FeedBurner</a><br />
<div>
<br /></div>
</form>
</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<ul style="background-color: white; margin: 0.5em 0px; padding: 0px 2.5em;">
<li><b>Money</b></li>
<ul>
<li style="margin: 0px 0px 0.25em; padding: 0px;">Go Fund Me: (<a href="http://www.gofundme.com/DestinationCDA" style="color: #2eb9ff; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">HERE</a>)</li>
<ul>
<li style="margin: 0px 0px 0.25em; padding: 0px;">You can contribute at the Go Fund Me page.</li>
</ul>
<li>Guide to Coeur d'Alene (Under Construction).&nbsp;</li>
<ul>
<li>Once it's ready, you can buy our Guide for $1.00 or more. This will allow you to contribute any amount you'd like to the move.</li>
</ul>
</ul>
</ul>
<br />
<div style="text-align: center;">
<object classid="clsid:D27CDB6E-AE6D-11cf-96B8-444553540000" height="338" title="Click Here to donate!" type="application/x-shockwave-flash" width="258"><param name="movie" value="//funds.gofundme.com/Widgetflex.swf" /><param name="quality" value="high" /><param name="flashvars" value="page=DestinationCDA&template=2" /><param name="wmode" value="transparent" /><embed allowScriptAccess="always" src="//funds.gofundme.com/Widgetflex.swf" quality="high" flashVars="page=DestinationCDA&template=2" type="application/x-shockwave-flash" wmode="transparent" width="258" height="338"></embed></object>
</div>
<br />
<b><br /></b>
<b><br /></b>
<b>Darrell Wolfe, and Family</b><br />
<b><br /></b>
<br />
<div>
Story Teller | INFJ | Intellection | Learner | Ideation | Achiever | Input | Multipotentialite</div>
<br />
<div>
</div>
<br />
<div style="-webkit-text-stroke-width: 0px; color: black; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: medium; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-weight: normal; letter-spacing: normal; line-height: normal; orphans: auto; text-align: start; text-indent: 0px; text-transform: none; white-space: normal; widows: 1; word-spacing: 0px;">
<div style="margin: 0px;">
<br /></div>
</div>
